including.example_en: Everyone was there, including the boss.

joy.example_en: She was filled with joy when she heard the news.
joy.example_ko: 그녀는 소식을 듣고 기쁨에 가득 찼다.

loud.example_en: The music is too loud. Can you turn it down?
loud.example_ko: 음악이 너무 시끄럽다. 줄여줄 수 있어?

calls.example_en: I got three calls from the doctor today.
calls.example_ko: 오늘 의사한테 전화가 세 통 왔다.

fair.example_en: That's not fair! He got a bigger piece.
fair.example_ko: 그건 불공평해! 그가 더 큰 조각을 가졌잖아.

idiot.example_en: I felt like an idiot for forgetting her name.

short.example_en: Life is too short to worry about small things.
short.example_ko: 인생은 작은 것에 걱정하기엔 너무 짧다.

hide.example_en: You can't hide the truth forever.

arms.example_en: She held the baby in her arms.

reality.example_en: You need to face reality and move on.

standing.example_en: He was standing at the door waiting for me.
standing.example_ko: 그는 문 앞에 서서 나를 기다리고 있었다.

conversation.example_en: We had a long conversation about the future.
conversation.example_ko: 우리는 미래에 대해 긴 대화를 나눴다.

warm.example_en: Put on a warm jacket before you go outside.
warm.example_ko: 밖에 나가기 전에 따뜻한 재킷을 입어라.

view.example_en: The view from the top was absolutely stunning.

government.example_en: The government announced a new policy today.

cookie.example_en: Would you like a chocolate chip cookie?

thoughts.example_en: What are your thoughts on this matter?

relationship.example_en: Trust is the foundation of any good relationship.

mistake.example_en: Everyone makes mistakes. That's how we learn.
mistake.example_ko: 모두 실수를 한다. 그렇게 배우는 거다.

problems.example_en: We need to solve this problem before it gets worse.
problems.example_ko: 더 나빠지기 전에 이 문제를 해결해야 한다.

insane.example_en: The traffic today was absolutely insane.

letter.example_en: She wrote him a long letter.

store.example_en: I'm going to the store to buy some milk.

surprised.example_en: I'm surprised you didn't know about this.

stress.example_en: Too much stress can make you sick.
stress.example_ko: 스트레스가 너무 많으면 아플 수 있다.

apart.example_en: They've been living apart for two years.

doctor.example_en: You should see a doctor if the pain continues.

knees.example_en: He fell and hurt his knee badly.

tight.example_en: These shoes are too tight. I need a bigger size.
tight.example_ko: 이 신발이 너무 꽉 낀다. 더 큰 사이즈가 필요해.

offer.example_en: He offered to help me carry the boxes.
offer.example_ko: 그가 상자를 나르는 것을 도와주겠다고 했다.

building.example_en: The tallest building in the city is 50 floors.

pass.example_en: Could you pass me the salt, please?

stick.example_en: Stick to the plan and don't give up.

expect.example_en: I didn't expect to see you here!

camera.example_en: Don't forget to bring your camera on the trip.
camera.example_ko: 여행에 카메라 가져가는 거 잊지 마.

angry.example_en: She was angry because he lied to her.
angry.example_ko: 그가 거짓말을 해서 그녀는 화가 났다.

field.example_en: She's an expert in the field of medicine.

figured.example_en: I figured out how to fix the problem.

tall.example_en: How tall are you? I'm about 180 centimeters.

missed.example_en: I really missed you while you were away.
missed.example_ko: 네가 없는 동안 정말 보고 싶었어.

smile.example_en: Her smile always brightens my day.
smile.example_ko: 그녀의 미소는 항상 내 하루를 밝게 한다.

park.example_en: Let's go for a walk in the park.

worst.example_en: That was the worst day of my life.

fix.example_en: Can you fix my phone? The screen is cracked.
fix.example_ko: 내 폰 고칠 수 있어? 화면이 깨졌어.

hotel.example_en: We booked a hotel near the beach.

president.example_en: The president gave a speech on national television.

fell.example_en: She fell off the ladder and broke her arm.

bank.example_en: I need to go to the bank to withdraw some cash.

certainly.example_en: I will certainly be there on time.

pulled.example_en: She pulled the door open and walked in.

cover.example_en: Cover your mouth when you cough.

captain.example_en: The captain announced we would land soon.

wet.example_en: Be careful, the floor is wet.

connection.example_en: There's no internet connection in this area.
connection.example_ko: 이 지역에는 인터넷 연결이 안 된다.

radio.example_en: I heard the news on the radio this morning.
radio.example_ko: 오늘 아침 라디오에서 그 소식을 들었다.

common.example_en: Colds are very common in winter.

push.example_en: Push the button to open the door.

older.example_en: My older brother lives in New York.

thousand.example_en: Thousands of people attended the concert.

pie.example_en: My grandmother makes the best apple pie.

ran.example_en: He ran as fast as he could to catch the bus.
ran.example_ko: 그는 버스를 타려고 최대한 빠르게 달렸다.

brilliant.example_en: That's a brilliant idea! Let's do it.

careful.example_en: Be careful when you cross the street.

neither.example_en: Neither of them knew the answer.

realized.example_en: I suddenly realized I had left my keys at home.
realized.example_ko: 갑자기 집에 열쇠를 두고 온 걸 깨달았다.

impossible.example_en: Nothing is impossible if you work hard enough.

charge.example_en: There's no extra charge for delivery.

unless.example_en: You'll fail unless you study harder.
unless.example_ko: 더 열심히 공부하지 않으면 떨어질 거야.

apparently.example_en: Apparently, the meeting has been cancelled.

key.example_en: I lost my car keys again.

choice.example_en: You have two choices: stay or leave.
choice.example_ko: 두 가지 선택이 있다: 남거나 떠나거나.

letting.example_en: Thank you for letting me stay at your place.

others.example_en: Some people agreed, but others disagreed.
others.example_ko: 어떤 사람들은 동의했지만, 다른 사람들은 반대했다.

situation.example_en: We need to handle this situation carefully.

stuck.example_en: I'm stuck in traffic. I'll be late.
stuck.example_ko: 교통체증에 갇혀 있어. 늦을 것 같아.

boss.example_en: My boss gave me a promotion last week.

luck.example_en: Good luck on your exam tomorrow!

golden.example_en: This is a golden opportunity you shouldn't miss.
golden.example_ko: 이건 놓쳐서는 안 될 황금 같은 기회다.

trick.example_en: The magician performed an amazing trick.

shirt.example_en: He was wearing a white shirt and a blue tie.
shirt.example_ko: 그는 흰 셔츠에 파란 넥타이를 매고 있었다.

flying.example_en: We're flying to London tomorrow morning.
flying.example_ko: 우리는 내일 아침 런던으로 비행기를 탄다.

forward.example_en: I'm looking forward to seeing you again.

whether.example_en: I don't know whether he's coming or not.

wind.example_en: The wind was so strong it blew my hat off.

needed.example_en: I needed more time to finish the project.
needed.example_ko: 프로젝트를 끝내려면 더 많은 시간이 필요했다.

complete.example_en: It was a complete disaster from start to finish.

drunk.example_en: He got drunk at the party last night.

rain.example_en: Take an umbrella. It looks like rain.
rain.example_ko: 우산 가져가. 비가 올 것 같아.

row.example_en: We sat in the front row at the concert.

basically.example_en: Basically, we need more money to finish the project.
basically.example_ko: 기본적으로 프로젝트를 끝내려면 돈이 더 필요하다.

button.example_en: Press the red button to start the machine.

lights.example_en: Please turn off the lights when you leave.

fat.example_en: You should eat less fat for your health.
fat.example_ko: 건강을 위해 지방을 적게 먹어야 한다.

quickly.example_en: We need to act quickly before it's too late.
quickly.example_ko: 너무 늦기 전에 빨리 행동해야 한다.

negative.example_en: Try not to be so negative about everything.
negative.example_ko: 모든 것에 대해 너무 부정적이지 마.

health.example_en: Exercise is important for your health.

land.example_en: They bought some land to build a house.
land.example_ko: 그들은 집을 짓기 위해 땅을 샀다.

pretend.example_en: He pretended to be asleep when I walked in.
pretend.example_ko: 내가 들어갔을 때 그는 자는 척했다.

steal.example_en: Someone stole my wallet on the subway.

study.example_en: I need to study for my exam tomorrow.

milk.example_en: Could I have some milk in my coffee?

shoot.example_en: They shot the movie in three different countries.

sky.example_en: The sky was clear and full of stars.

level.example_en: Her English is at an advanced level.

math.example_en: I was never good at math in school.
math.example_ko: 나는 학교에서 수학을 잘한 적이 없다.

early.example_en: I woke up early to catch the first train.

classic.example_en: This movie is a classic. Everyone should watch it.
classic.example_ko: 이 영화는 명작이다. 모두가 봐야 한다.

waste.example_en: Don't waste your time on things that don't matter.
waste.example_ko: 중요하지 않은 것에 시간을 낭비하지 마.

loves.example_en: She loves reading books before bed.
loves.example_ko: 그녀는 자기 전에 책 읽는 것을 좋아한다.

boyfriend.example_en: She's been dating her boyfriend for three years.

falling.example_en: The leaves are falling from the trees.

meaning.example_en: What's the meaning of this word?

travel.example_en: I love to travel and explore new places.
travel.example_ko: 나는 여행하며 새로운 곳을 탐험하는 것을 좋아한다.

faster.example_en: Can you walk a little faster? We're going to be late.
faster.example_ko: 좀 더 빨리 걸을 수 있어? 늦겠다.

dangerous.example_en: It's dangerous to drive in this weather.

dying.example_en: I'm dying to know what happened next.
dying.example_ko: 다음에 무슨 일이 있었는지 너무 궁금해 죽겠다.

tired.example_en: I'm so tired. I need to get some sleep.

sleeping.example_en: The baby is sleeping. Please be quiet.

major.example_en: This is a major decision that will affect your future.
major.example_ko: 이것은 네 미래에 영향을 미칠 중대한 결정이다.

list.example_en: Don't forget to make a shopping list.
list.example_ko: 쇼핑 목록 만드는 거 잊지 마.

usually.example_en: I usually wake up at seven o'clock.

evening.example_en: What do you usually do in the evening?

green.example_en: The traffic light turned green and we started walking.

giant.example_en: They built a giant statue in the city center.

per.example_en: The speed limit is 60 miles per hour.

state.example_en: The house was in a terrible state after the party.

blood.example_en: She donated blood at the hospital.

report.example_en: The report shows a 20% increase in sales.

acting.example_en: Her acting in that movie was incredible.

gold.example_en: She won a gold medal at the Olympics.

decision.example_en: Making the right decision isn't always easy.
decision.example_ko: 올바른 결정을 내리는 것이 항상 쉽지는 않다.

master.example_en: He's a master of his craft.

desk.example_en: There are too many papers on my desk.
desk.example_ko: 내 책상 위에 서류가 너무 많다.

join.example_en: Would you like to join us for dinner?

dancing.example_en: She loves dancing to her favorite songs.
dancing.example_ko: 그녀는 좋아하는 노래에 맞춰 춤추는 것을 좋아한다.

original.example_en: This painting is an original, not a copy.

sexy.example_en: That's a really sexy dress you're wearing.

raise.example_en: She raised her hand to ask a question.

pressure.example_en: There's a lot of pressure at work these days.

balls.example_en: The kids were playing with a ball in the yard.
balls.example_ko: 아이들이 마당에서 공을 가지고 놀고 있었다.

royal.example_en: The royal family visited the hospital.

scene.example_en: That was my favorite scene in the movie.
scene.example_ko: 그건 영화에서 내가 가장 좋아하는 장면이었다.

amount.example_en: A large amount of money was spent on this project.

monday.example_en: I have a meeting every Monday morning.

however.example_en: The plan was good. However, it was too expensive.

lonely.example_en: Living alone can be very lonely sometimes.
lonely.example_ko: 혼자 사는 것은 가끔 매우 외로울 수 있다.

price.example_en: What's the price of this jacket?

moved.example_en: We moved to a new apartment last month.

interest.example_en: She has a strong interest in art history.
interest.example_ko: 그녀는 미술사에 강한 관심을 가지고 있다.

pleasure.example_en: It was a pleasure to meet you.

obviously.example_en: Obviously, we need to find a better solution.
obviously.example_ko: 분명히 더 나은 해결책을 찾아야 한다.

plus.example_en: The room is spacious, plus it has a nice view.

grateful.example_en: I'm so grateful for your help.

lead.example_en: She was chosen to lead the team.

tiny.example_en: The baby has such tiny fingers.

gift.example_en: I bought a birthday gift for my friend.

marry.example_en: They decided to marry after dating for five years.

beginning.example_en: This is just the beginning of something amazing.
